Bug / Task Description: normalized_mutual_information underreports similarity: two identical clusterings score 0.5 instead of 1.0, and all NMI values are uniformly compressed toward zero. The mutual-information sum is correct; the bug is in the normalization denominator that converts raw mutual information into the [0,1] NMI score.
Commit Subject: fix(community): normalize NMI by mean of the two cluster entropies
